name: claude-creative-stack
description: Skills, prompts, artifacts, and MCP servers for building art, animation, graphics, games, UX/UI, and advanced creative workflows with Claude.
author: Bar Moshe and contributors
note: This file is named `claude-plugin.marketplace.json` in the repo because dotfile paths are blocked in the authoring environment. To activate as a Claude Code plugin marketplace, move it to `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`.

plugins.name: artifact-game-builder
plugins.description: Single-file playable game scaffolding for Claude artifacts.

plugins.name: animation-composer
plugins.description: Orchestrator for web animation — picks CSS, Motion, GSAP, Theatre, Lottie, or Rive.

plugins.name: shader-smith
plugins.description: GLSL fragment shader authoring with WebGL2 or Three.js r128 wrappers.

plugins.name: palette-generator
plugins.description: Accessible oklch palette generator with WCAG AA verification.

plugins.name: sprite-atlas-builder
plugins.description: Sprite atlas planner, manifest generator, and placeholder PNG generator.

plugins.name: ui-design-kit
plugins.description: Themeable shadcn-style UI kit with oklch tokens and dark mode.

plugins.name: procgen-toolkit
plugins.description: Seeded BSP, WFC, cellular-automata, and noise generators.

mcps.name: palette-oklch
mcps.description: MCP server exposing the palette-generator logic as tool calls.
